title: Factorial via reduce
code: from functools import reduce; factorial = lambda n: reduce(lambda a, b: a * b, range(1, n + 1), 1)
description: `reduce` folds a sequence into a single value by repeatedly applying a binary function. Here it computes `1 * 2 * 3 * ... * n`. The initial value `1` handles `n=0` correctly, returning 1.
